summary: Tested all Brass Rods Export Division additions. Backend: 10/10 pytest pass — added two new tests covering 'Brass Rods · Export' and 'International / UAE' interest values (POST /api/inquiries persists + GET verifies). Frontend: every spec from the request verified against the live preview URL — rods-section renders between Products and WhyChooseUs, all 4 rod-type cards (R-01..R-04) load with their respective /generated/*.jpg images (naturalWidth 1408 each), brass-rods-hero.jpg loads in Products grid, spec-table has exactly 10 rows, rods-cta-quote scrolls smoothly to #contact, rods-cta-whatsapp opens wa.me/919099369442 link with prefilled export text, navbar 'Export' link (nav-link-rods) and mobile-nav-rods both scroll to #rods, contact chips include both new interests, full inquiry submission with interest='Brass Rods · Export' succeeds and shows success toast, WhatsApp floating button still works, mobile 390px viewport responsive.

minor.issue: Pre-existing: exception handler references `logger` (line 95) before it's defined (line 123). Lazy resolution saves it but ordering is fragile. Carried over from iteration_1.
Pre-existing: allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' violates CORS spec. Carried over from iteration_1.

critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx interest chip data-testid uses '·' and '/' raw characters (e.g., interest-brass-rods-·-export, interest-international-/-uae) — works but unusual; consider slugifying to ASCII for cleaner selectors.
Navbar/Footer scroll buttons remain <button> instead of <a href='#section'> — minor a11y/SEO opportunity (carried from iteration_1).
GET /api/inquiries still publicly readable with no auth — leaks customer PII (carried from iteration_1, important for production).
Footer COLLECTION list is hard-coded strings (not links) while QUICK list links — could unify so 'Brass Rods' anchors to #rods.
Backend Inquiry model accepts `interest` as free string with max_length=80 — both new values fit (20 and 19 chars). No enum constraint, so any string works — fine for this MVP.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed inquiry rows in MongoDB 'inquiries' collection: TEST_Export Buyer (interest=Brass Rods · Export), TEST_International Inquiry (interest=International / UAE), TEST UI Buyer (via Playwright form submit). Safe to leave or prune by name LIKE 'TEST%'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_alux_api.py (pytest, 10 tests). Public URL https://architectural-metal.preview.emergentagent.com. Generated images at /app/frontend/public/generated/ served at /generated/*.jpg correctly. data-testids of note: rods-section, spec-table (10 rows), rod-type-R-01..R-04, rods-cta-quote, rods-cta-whatsapp, nav-link-rods, mobile-nav-rods, interest-brass-rods-·-export, interest-international-/-uae. Smooth-scroll requires ~1.2-1.5s wait after click before asserting target section's getBoundingClientRect.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — all new Brass Rods Export features work as specified and no regressions in pre-existing flows.
